title: Stressworks Cozy Edition
description: Prepare for a cozy adventure featuring: Create, Farmer's Delight, Domestic Innovation, Villager Recruits, Better Combat, and of course we have plenty more :)
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/olTReGhU/bec55c9695aaa0cde8f1220790a604095743de43_96.webp)


**Prepare for a cozy adventure**...


![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52b7625c8d1904bb44becb090e83b9fe37878401.png)



**Featuring:**
- Create
- Farmer's Delight
- Domestic Innovation
- Villager Recruits
- Better Combat
...of course we have plenty more :)



![Backported Updates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/olTReGhU/images/c642f36e4b956c94bbbdd6e6f2806e02cf1388af.png)



With some backported Minecraft Updates, I want to make sure you're not missing out!
This modpack is mainly for my friends, but to make it easily available for them to download and for everyone!



![Better Villages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/olTReGhU/images/04a7a91c24ff5b9895b170ee4adcf051a16c4c93.png)
